identificationModule.officialTitle: Postoperative Recurrence Risk Evaluation of Hormone Receptor Positive, Her-2 Negative Breast Cancer by Using Different 21-gene Detection Kits (REBCK)

responsibleParty.investigatorTitle: Professor, Thyroid breast and vascular surgery, Principal Investigator

descriptionModule.briefSummary: Breast cancer patients with early breast cancer were enrolled according to the inclusion criteria. Baseline characteristics were recorded from medical record system. Recurrence score were obtained by 21-gene detection kits from different biological companies. Relationship between recurrence score and the prognosis was explored. Meanwhile, the investigators analyzed the consistency of the results obtained from various 21-gene test kits and immunohistochemistry detection.

interventions.name: recurrence risk evaluation
interventions.description: Recurrence score were obtained by 21-gene detection kits from different biological companies. The expression of ER, PR, and Her-2 were also detected by IHC.

primaryOutcomes.description: x2 value and P value of chi-square test

secondaryOutcomes.description: kappa value, P value of consistency analysis

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

1. breast cancer in stage I-III, tumor size\>0.5cm
2. lymph nodes negative
3. hormone receptor positive （ER+/PR+,ER+/PR-,ER-/PR+）
4. HER2 negative（IHC 0 or +， FISH negative）
5. receive endocrine therapy only
6. enough FFPE samples within 10 years（3\~6 10μm ）
7. patients with integrated medical records

Exclusion Criteria:

1. Tumor cells \<5%
2. Isolated RNA\<500ng
eligibilityModule.studyPopulation: Breast cancer patients with early breast cancer were enrolled according to the inclusion criteria. Baseline characteristics were recorded from medical record system. Recurrence score were obtained by 21-gene detection kits from different biological companies. Relationship between recurrence score and the prognosis was explored. Meanwhile, we analyzed the consistency of the results obtained from various 21-gene test kits and immunohistochemistry detection.
